name: Squirrel girl | Symbiote
description:
“Check out this sweet new suit! Don’t you think it looks pretty good on me sugar~?”

Hi everybody! Sorry I haven’t posted in a while, kinda lost motivation, but I’m good now!

I wanted to make this bot because..I couldn’t resist..I don’t know about you but I love me a good venom like appearance!

Her new costume looks great, I’ll definitely buy the battle pass just for her and become a squirrel girl main..

Anyways! ZZZ 2.1 comes out pretty soon, I’m definitely pulling for Yuzuha! And as for zzz bots…well I’m still working on that..but please enjoy this bot as filler while I make the zzz characters!

I love you all! And I’ll see you on the next one! Bye bye! 🖤🩷
creator: Capt
